# Bel Ağrısı Serisi — Derleme (2026-04-05)

> Bu içerik otomatik derlenmiştir. Tıbbi öneri yerine geçmez; kişisel durumunuz için uzmana danışınız.

## 🔬 Hakemli Makaleler (PubMed)

### Recent highlights in low back pain research, Part II: Prevention and management.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik recent highlights in bel ağrısı research, part ii: prevention and management. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of fizyoterapi. 2026 apr 2. Anahtar kavramlar: recent, highlights, low, back, ağrı, research.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41933950/

### Surgical Management of Concurrent Cranial and Spinal Subdural Hematomas Causing Confusion and Lower-Extremity Weakness: A Case Report and Literature Review.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik surgical management of concurrent cranial and spinal subdural hematomas causing confusion and lower-extremity weakness: a case report and literature review. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: the american journal of case reports. 2026 apr 4. Anahtar kavramlar: case, surgical, management, concurrent, cranial, spinal.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41933880/

### Editorial "Ultrashort Echo Time Magnetization Transfer MR Imaging of Lumbar Nerve Roots in Patients With Disc Herniation".
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik editorial "ultrashort echo time magnetization transfer mr imaging of lomber (bel bölgesi) nerve roots in patients with disc herniation". konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: journal of magnetic resonance imaging : jmri. 2026 apr 3. Anahtar kavramlar: imaging, editorial, ultrashort, echo, time, magnetization.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41933460/

### Correction to "Cross-scan fusion network: A registration-based framework for annotation-efficient 3D ultrasound segmentation in low back pain assessment".
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik correction to "cross-scan fusion network: a registration-based framework for annotation-efficient 3d ultrasound segmentation in bel ağrısı assessment". konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: medical physics. 2026 apr. Anahtar kavramlar: correction, cross, scan, fusion, network, registration.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41932857/

### Sirt1 Deficiency Promotes Dynamic Fibroblast-to-Myofibroblast Transition in Ligamentum Flavum Hypertrophy via the Smad2/3 Pathway.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik sirt1 deficiency promotes dynamic fibroblast-to-myofibroblast transition in ligamentum flavum hypertrophy via the smad2/3 pathway. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: experimental cell research. 2026 apr 1. Anahtar kavramlar: sirt, deficiency, promotes, dynamic, fibroblast, myofibroblast.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41932595/

### Baseline associations between thoracic expansion, respiratory function, and pain in nonspecific low back pain: A cross-sectional analysis from the DIAFRAGMA trial.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik baseline associations between thoracic expansion, respiratory fonksiyon, and ağrı in nonspecific bel ağrısı: a cross-sectional analysis from the diafragma klinik çalışma. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: plos one. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: ağrı, baseline, associations, between, thoracic, expansion.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41931538/

### Association of the 24-hour movement behaviours composition with workers' chronic musculoskeletal pain.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik association of the 24-hour movement behaviours composition with workers' chronic musculoskeletal ağrı. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: plos one. 2026. Anahtar kavramlar: association, hour, movement, behaviours, composition, workers.
- **Kaynak:** https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/41931490/

### Transcriptome data combined with two-sample Mendelian randomization reveal IRF1 and PRKD1 as UPR-related key regulators in intervertebral disc degeneration.
- **Türkçe özet:** Bu içerik transcriptome data combined with two-sample mendelian randomization reveal irf1 and prkd1 as upr-related key regulators in intervertebral disc degeneration. konusuna odaklanıyor. Öne çıkan başlıklar: medicine. 2026 apr 3. Anahtar kavramlar: transcriptome, data, combined, two, sample, mendelian.
